title: Docs Sources Config
description: Configuration for .github/scripts/sync-docs.js — upstream markdown documentation synced into plugin skill references/ folders.

exclusions.description: Glob patterns excluded from every upstream's scan (e.g. '**/README.md').

upstreams.description: Upstream (repository, revision) pairs to sync from. Each entry is one checkout.

revision.description: Git revision: branch name, tag, or commit SHA. Fetched directly via git (no GitHub API).

pattern.description: Glob pattern (e.g. 'docs/**/*.md') or literal path relative to the upstream repository root.

target.description: Destination directory relative to this repository's root. Matched files land under 'target' with the static prefix of 'pattern' stripped. The destination is wiped before each sync — removing a mapping from manifest.json leaves stale files behind.

as.description: Optional rename. When set, 'pattern' must match exactly one file, which is written to 'target/as' instead of preserving its source name.
